---
name: "📝 Information update"
about: "Fix outdated, incorrect, or missing information"
title: "[📝 Info Update]: "
labels: [documentation]
assignees: []
---

## 👋 What is this template for?

Use this form to report wrong, old, or missing information in docs/pages.
This includes typos, broken links, outdated commands, or unclear explanations.

## 🔍 What needs to be updated?

Describe what information is wrong, outdated, incomplete, or unclear.

## 🧭 Update type

- [ ] ❌ Incorrect information
- [ ] 🕒 Outdated information
- [ ] ➕ Missing information
- [ ] 🔗 Broken link or reference

## 📍 Where is it?

Provide the exact page/file path and section heading where the issue appears.

## 📄 Current information

Paste the current text (or summarize it) so maintainers can find it quickly.

## ✨ Suggested update

Provide the corrected or updated information.

## 🧩 Ready-to-use replacement text (optional)

```text
Paste the exact replacement text here.
```

## 🎯 Why this change matters

Explain the impact (for example: misleading instructions, broken command, outdated version, etc.).

## 📚 References (optional)

Add links or sources that verify the new information.

## 📎 Extra notes (optional)

Any context that helps maintainers review and apply the update.

## ✅ Final checklist

- [ ] I provided the exact location of the content.
- [ ] I included corrected or improved information.
- [ ] I added references where relevant.
